issues.detail: The instructions lack handling for missing or malformed input documents, leading to potential failures.
The instructions contain verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.
The guidance provides high-level steps but lacks detailed, executable procedures for all steps.
The skill assumes optional Python usage and specific agent capabilities, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Tailor a software engineer resume to a data engineering role
scenarios.rationale: Treatment categorizes required vs preferred keywords, reports a before/after match rate (targeting 80%+), rewrites bullets only for genuine experience, and reorders sections per the skill; baseline gives generic resume advice.

scenarios.name: Fix an ATS-rejected resume
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the documented ATS fixes (standard section headers, no tables/columns, spell out acronyms on first use, standard date formats, exact job-title keywords); baseline lists generic resume tips.
